bill will be Jessie Shirley, the ia
vorite Of Spokane playgoers, in her
original playlet called THE First
Woman Governor" The play deals
with suffrage and goes 20 years
into the future, when women will
presumably stand side by side with
men in the political field. The prob
lem of the sketch is whether
woman (given a position Of author
ity) would be ruled by head or
heart in matters Of vital import
ance. The sketch contains all the
essentials of a successful play, a
surprise, an original situation and
a climax. Miss Shirley plays the
leading character and will be sup
ported by Frank McQuarrie, Leslie
Greer and Dan Edison, three of the
old Shirley favorites. Other men,
bers on the bill include Edna Aug,
the pretty and petite coincidence.
and Les Myosotis, premier dancers
from the Royal opera at Munich.
